narrative:
Beavercreek 018 (precinct in Greene County) has 797 registered voters, with 46.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.2 percentage points.
